Defines `TickType_t`, includes FreeRTOS license info, and provides RTC header.


## Files
- **[FreeRTOS.h](FreeRTOS.h.md)**: Defines the `TickType_t` type as a 32-bit unsigned integer.
- **[FreeRTOSConfig.h](FreeRTOSConfig.h.md)**: License information for FreeRTOS under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
- **[portable.h](portable.h.md)**: Apache License, Version 2.0, for the file in the pebble-firmware codebase.
- **[sys_rtc.h](sys_rtc.h.md)**: Header file for getting the current value of the real-time clock.
